name: True Love is Delicious
original_name: รักแท้แซ่บหลาย
overview: Chomjan is a prickle-fish vendor who sells her pickled fish using her family's secret recipe in order to support her sister, Methinee, study abroad. Her main helper is Gloy, an orphan who loves her like a sister. When Methinee returns, she brings along a boyfriend who is unaware of her true lifestyle. Ashamed of her life and poverty, Methinee asks Chomjan to lie about her occupation in order to not embarrass Methinee in front of her boyfriend and his family. A request which brings Chomjan a lot of sadness.

trailers.title: แอบแซ่บ Ost.รักแท้แซ่บหลาย | POPPY Chatchaya [Official MV]
